# ErgoRemote

ErgoRemote is an independent editorial site covering ergonomic gear, home office setup, remote work accessories, and practical buying guides for work-from-home professionals.

Canonical URL: https://ergoremote.com/
Site description: Honest reviews and guides for remote workers, home office builders, and ergonomics nerds.
Author: Alex Sabr
Author URL: https://ergoremote.com/about/

## Main sections
- Best Picks: https://ergoremote.com/best-picks/
- Comparisons: https://ergoremote.com/comparisons/
- How To: https://ergoremote.com/how-to/
- About: https://ergoremote.com/about/
- Contact: https://ergoremote.com/contact/

## Editorial scope
ErgoRemote publishes original content about:
- ergonomic chairs
- standing desks
- laptop stands
- monitors
- docking stations and USB-C hubs
- home office accessories
- remote work setup and comfort

## Author information
Alex Sabr is a Canada-based remote worker and home office specialist with 5+ years of work-from-home experience. Content is written in a practical first-person editorial style focused on real use, ergonomics, comfort, and buying decisions for home office setups.

## Content and monetization note
Content on ErgoRemote is original editorial content. The site is affiliate-monetized, including Amazon affiliate links, and may earn a commission from qualifying purchases at no additional cost to the reader. Monetization does not change the stated editorial intent of the content.

## Preferred canonical references
- Homepage: https://ergoremote.com/
- Sitemap: https://ergoremote.com/sitemap.xml
- About the author: https://ergoremote.com/about/
